reviews.review_body: Very worst experience in last academic year 25-26.In this generation, there are no good principals in any school.

reviews.review_body:
One of the best school with proper guidance to students as well as parents with regular updations
A great thanks to principal mam and the whole management team
Keep rocking

reviews.author: Ancy Hussain
reviews.review_body: We are very satisfied.Very good Atmosphere.  Every child gets ample opportunities to explore and progress in all aspects. Good communication. Highly appreciating the efforts taken by teachers for the improvement of each and every students. Teaching and non teaching staffs all are very kind and polite. Over all we are very much satisfied that we put our child in Mater Dei😊

reviews.author: Murugesh Bojan -Hr
reviews.review_body: Getting their kids an excellent, moral education is every parent's ambition. Without concern for anything else, every child should be building the foundation for a robust educational system. With some of the best education available under the ICSE Board, my child is enrolled in the LKG programme at Mater Die International School. His amount of tutoring is far more than I could have ever expected. The school provides a wonderful environment, and they are effective at communicating with parents about school-related matters and taking care of the health and safety of their pupils. A typical, established institution has first-rate features throughout, including knowledgeable administrative staff. The aforementioned school technique was explained by Mrs. Dayana very clearly when he joined.  Furthermore. Together with the incredibly welcoming and kind academic instructors, the principal, Mrs. Pandiselvi, runs this school in an amazing way and exhibits outstanding leadership in the academic realm. All academic and administrative problems are being handled by Mr. Martin, the correspondent, who will provide the school with good future support. With all of my best wishes, I say "go ahead." I'm very grateful.👏👏👏👏👍

reviews.review_body: Very good school... Every child is giving ideal coaching and bringing them for a bright future...

reviews.review_body: Good place to cultivate and mold d child future in extraordinary way.

reviews.author: Paulinkamal Augustro
reviews.review_body:
My both kids studying here from 2017. Friendly atmosphere. Good teaching and extra activities like Speak to lead make them reading habits, thinking, confident power and stage fearless. Developed their language skill. Friendly atmosphere with Teaching staff, Non-teaching staff, Principal and Correspondent.
Growing school with dedication on Children growth and Care to make them Global leader.
